note: HyperLiquid Bridge2 on Arbitrum (chain 42161). The ONLY user (pre-sign) function is batchedDepositWithPermit (USDC deposit to HyperCore). The 13 other mutating fns are validator/finalizer rotation (batched*Withdrawals/invalidate) + bridge governance (change*/modify*/updateValidatorSet/*ValidatorSetUpdate) + emergency-lock voting — all privileged operator calls on a 4-EOA validator rotation, not user wallets. cover=1, exclude=13.

0xb30b5bce.name: batchedDepositWithPermit
0xb30b5bce.reason: User USDC deposit to HyperCore: an array of {user,usd,deadline,signature} EIP-2612-permit-backed deposits. The pre-sign wallet surface (decoded as multicall of token transfers). cover.

0xc5bdf3ca.name: batchedFinalizeWithdrawals
0xc5bdf3ca.reason: Validator/finalizer infra (the Bridge2 operates on a 4-EOA validator rotation, not user wallets — confirmed by Etherscan caller analysis). Not a pre-sign user surface. exclude.

0x1f12171f.name: batchedRequestWithdrawals
0x1f12171f.reason: Validator/finalizer infra (the Bridge2 operates on a 4-EOA validator rotation, not user wallets — confirmed by Etherscan caller analysis). Not a pre-sign user surface. exclude.
